symbols.signature: brain-gekko-inbox.sh <SRC> <DEST> [--title T] [--tags t1,t2] -> writes $DEST/$SLUG.md with frontmatter (type: note, title, tags), slug from basename
symbols.type_text: (src: path, dest: path, opts: {title?: string, tags?: string}) => void

symbols.signature: find_page(wiki_dir, slug) -> Path | None — rglob('*.md') matching stem == slug
read_page(path) -> {frontmatter: dict, body: str, path: str} — naive '---'-split frontmatter parse (k: v per line, no nesting)
symbols.type_text: (path: Path) => {frontmatter: object, body: string, path: string}

symbols.signature: SCHEMA.md conventions: mandatory frontmatter type in {note, moc, entity, decision, runbook}, tags, status in {draft, active, archived}

risks.note: codebase-memory-mcp was not used for this bundle (bash-script feature, no indexed symbols expected for scripts/brain-merge-hook.sh et al. on an unmerged PR branch) — intel gathered via direct Read of the PR #2559 worktree instead. loc fields for the three new files are 0 (files do not exist yet); the plan subagent must recompute s1_budget after writing each file via `wc -l` (limit values above already reflect scripts/plan-lint.sh:_ext_limit for .sh=500 / .bats=0-ungated).
